title: Iranian Expats in U.A.E. Caught Between Home and Homeland
summary_full: Iran’s retaliatory attacks on the United Arab Emirates have put the U.A.E.’s large Iranian expatriate community in an uncomfortable position.
summary_public: Iran’s retaliatory attacks on the United Arab Emirates have put the U.A.E.’s large Iranian expatriate community in an uncomfortable position.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran’s retaliatory attacks on the United Arab Emirates
